title: Review CI trigger scope
description: Review the workflow change to confirm the path filter is syntactically correct, the allowlist is complete, and the excluded areas align with the spec's release-noise goals.
acceptance_criteria: Review confirms spec-only commits would not trigger CI.
Review confirms `.orchestrator/`-only commits would not trigger CI.
Review confirms changes to `src/`, `pyproject.toml`, `templates/**`, `.agents/skills/**`, and `.claude/skills/**` would still trigger CI.
Review confirms no tester bead is needed because validation is limited to workflow-scope inspection.
conflict_risks: None — only file touched is `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, no overlap with other in-progress beads.
